[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 1/23 (Mon), Lesson & Scrimmages rewards will be doubled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your students and exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 1/23 (Mon) 19:00 – 1/30 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
